blocks.content: Wellnite is on a mission to make therapy accessible. By embedding Whereby's reliable video technology directly into their platform, they removed technical barriers for patients in need.

### Scaling with Confidence

Security and HIPAA compliance were non-negotiable for Wellnite. Whereby provided the infrastructure that allowed their development team to focus on the patient experience rather than building video engines from scratch.
